TASKS.TITLE_PLACEHOLDER: What do you need to do?
TASKS.CREATE_FIRST_TASK: Create your first task to get started!
TASKS.INSTALL_ALERT: You can install this PWA on your device by adding it to your home screen from the browser settings

OPTIONS.SYNC_LOCAL_TASKS: Sync your local tasks to the cloud
OPTIONS.SIGN_IN_TO_SYNC: Sign in to sync your tasks
OPTIONS.DELETE_ALL_TASKS_DESCRIPTION: Permanently remove all tasks from your list
OPTIONS.DELETE_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION: Permanently remove your user ID and cloud data
OPTIONS.DARK_MODE_DESCRIPTION: Toggle between light and dark theme
OPTIONS.LOGIN_ALERT_MESSAGE: Enter your 4-digit PIN to sync your tasks
OPTIONS.GO_OFFLINE_ALERT: Are you sure that you want to go offline? You will need your personal PIN to sync your tasks again
OPTIONS.DELETE_USER_ALERT: Are you sure that you want to delete your User ID? This will delete all your tasks from the cloud but will keep them on the device
OPTIONS.INFO_ALERT: Upload the tasks to get an user ID, which you can use to sync your tasks on any device. Tasks are automatically synced on changes until you delete your user ID
OPTIONS.DELETE_FROM_BOTH_CLOUD_AND_DEVICE: Delete from Both Cloud and Device
OPTIONS.DELETE_TASKS_ALERT: Are you sure that you want to delete all your tasks from the device? If you just want to delete a task, slide it to the left
OPTIONS.CHOOSE_WHERE_DELETE_TASKS: Choose where to delete your tasks from:
OPTIONS.TASKS_DELETED_CLOUD_OFFLINE_MODE: Tasks deleted from cloud, now you are in offline mode
OPTIONS.ALL_TASKS_DELETED_CLOUD_DEVICE: All tasks deleted from cloud and device.

PIN_DIALOG.TITLE: Important Security Information
PIN_DIALOG.SECURITY_WARNING: Save this PIN in a secure location. You will need it to access your tasks on other devices.
PIN_DIALOG.INFO_TEXT: This PIN cannot be recovered after closing this dialog. Write it down on paper or copy it to a secure location.
PIN_DIALOG.CONFIRM_CHECKBOX: I have saved my PIN securely
PIN_DIALOG.CONFIRM_HINT: Please confirm you have saved your PIN
